title: Make Two Arrays Equal by Reversing Subarrays
titleCn: 通过翻转子数组使两个数组相等

testcases.input: target = [1,2,3,4], arr = [2,4,1,3] Output: true Explanation: You can follow the next steps to convert arr to target: 1- Reverse subarray [2,4,1], arr becomes [1,4,2,3] 2- Reverse subarray [4,2], arr becomes [1,2,4,3] 3- Reverse subarray [4,3], arr becomes [1,2,3,4] There are multiple ways to convert arr to target, this is not the only way to do so.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can follow the next steps to convert arr to target: 1- Reverse subarray [2,4,1], arr becomes [1,4,2,3] 2- Reverse subarray [4,2], arr becomes [1,2,4,3] 3- Reverse subarray [4,3], arr becomes [1,2,3,4] There are multiple ways to convert arr to target, this is not the only way to do so.

testcases.input: target = [7], arr = [7] Output: true Explanation: arr is equal to target without any reverses.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: arr is equal to target without any reverses.

testcases.input: target = [3,7,9], arr = [3,7,11] Output: false Explanation: arr does not have value 9 and it can never be converted to target.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: arr does not have value 9 and it can never be converted to target.
